scenario.title: The Degradation Strategy
scenario.context: Your production AI service needs to maintain availability even when AI capabilities degrade. You need a comprehensive graceful degradation strategy with multiple fallback levels.
scenario.goal: Write a prompt that defines a multi-tier degradation strategy with observability and automatic recovery.
constraints: Define 3+ degradation levels (full AI, partial AI, no AI)
Specify triggers for each degradation level
scenario.exampleInput: E-commerce product recommendation service. Level 1: Full AI personalization. Level 2: AI with cached models (lower quality). Level 3: Rule-based recommendations (no AI). Level 4: Trending/popular only (minimal logic).
hints: Include recovery path back to full service

rubric.name: Degradation Triggers
rubric.description: Are triggers for each level specified?

scoringGuide.excellent: Specific metrics and thresholds per level
Full metrics schema with alert thresholds
